news.t: Davis Select U.S. Equity ETF (DUSA) Surpasses $1 Billion in Assets
Davis ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listing of All Four Funds to CBOE Global Markets, Inc.
FANG ETFs outperform as CEOs face Congress

holdings.infoBox: DUSA is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Capital One Financial stock at 7.26%, U.S. Bancorp at 6.42%, Texas Instruments at 6.20%, Tyson Foods at 6.10%, and Devon Energy at 5.93%.

overview.description: The Davis Select U.S. Equity ETF (DUSA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US large-cap stocks. The investment process targets companies considered to have long-term value potential. DUSA was launched on Jan 11, 2017 and is issued by Davis.

data.title: Davis Select U.S. Equity ETF (DUSA) Surpasses $1 Billion in Assets
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Davis Advisors, announced that the Davis Select U.S. Equity ETF (DUSA) has surpassed $1 billion in assets under management.

data.title: Davis ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listing of All Four Funds to CBOE Global Markets, Inc.
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Davis ETFs are actively managed ETFs with combined assets of over $1.2 billion and were launched in 2017. Davis Selected Advisers, L.P. announced today plans to transfer the...

data.title: FANG ETFs outperform as CEOs face Congress
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with heavy exposure to tech giants outperformed Wednesday even as the companies faced questioning on Capitol Hill. Shares of Amazon.com Inc.

data.title: ETFs to watch as GE slashes dividend
data.text: CNBC's Mike Santoli reports on ETFs to watch after General Electric slashes its dividend.
